description.en: Return the key associated with a registered file object. This returns the SelectorKey instance associated to this file object, or raises KeyError if the file object is not registered.

excerpt.es: Return the key associated with a registered file object. This returns the SelectorKey instance associated to this file object, or raises KeyError if the file object is not registered.
excerpt.en: Return the key associated with a registered file object. This returns the SelectorKey instance associated to this file object, or raises KeyError if the file object is not registered.

description.en: Return a mapping of file objects to selector keys. This returns a Mapping instance mapping registered file objects to their associated SelectorKey instance.

excerpt.es: Return a mapping of file objects to selector keys. This returns a Mapping instance mapping registered file objects to their associated SelectorKey instance.
excerpt.en: Return a mapping of file objects to selector keys. This returns a Mapping instance mapping registered file objects to their associated SelectorKey instance.
